decisions.decision: 使用 openpyxl 解析 Excel（非 pandas）
decisions.rationale: PRD 经验：openpyxl 逐行读取更可控，避免 NaN 类型问题

decisions.decision: UPSERT 策略 (date, symbol) 唯一索引
decisions.rationale: 支持补传历史数据时自动覆盖，避免重复记录

decisions.decision: 前端新增 tab 位于 AI 资产分析之上
仅 admin 角色可访问
decisions.rationale: 使用现有 @admin_required 装饰器和 permission meta

decisions.decision: 3 个 API 端点：upload / uploads / dates
decisions.rationale: 最小化 Phase 1 API，后续阶段按需扩展

next_action: Run /gsd-plan-phase 1 to create detailed execution plan for data pipeline and permissions
context_notes: Phase 1 context discussion completed with all 16 decisions locked. No gray areas needed user discussion — all accepted Claude's recommended approach. Project is fully initialized with PROJECT.md, REQUIREMENTS.md, ROADMAP.md, STATE.md, and Phase 1 CONTEXT.md.
